        @media (max-width: 768px) {

        /* BLAZOR HYDRATION FLASH FIX: Prevent content from disappearing during reconnection */
        app { display: block; min-height: 100vh; }

        .mainscreen__header,
        .mainscreen__subheader,
        .mainscreen__cta {
            opacity: 1 !important;
            animation: none !important;
        }
        
        /* Reserve space for hero section to prevent layout shift */
        .mainscreen { min-height: 500px; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .mainscreen { min-height: 400px; }
        }

    <script>
        // Optimistic UI for Account Selection (Hydration handover)
        window.pendingAccountSelection = null;
        window.selectAccountOptimistic = function(element, id) {
            // Remove --active from siblings
            if (element && element.parentElement) {
                var items = element.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.account-row__item');
                items.forEach(function(item) {
                     item.classList.remove('--active');
                });
                element.classList.add('--active');
                window.pendingAccountSelection = id;
            }
        };
        window.getPendingAccountSelection = function() {
            var val = window.pendingAccountSelection;
            window.pendingAccountSelection = null; 
            return val;
        };
    </script>

        color: #6b7280;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: color 0.2s ease;

        color: var(--color-header);
    }

                        this.setTheme('dark', false);
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Theme init error:', e);
                }
            },

            setTheme: function(theme, save = true) {
                try {
                    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);
                    if (save) {
                        localStorage.setItem('theme', theme);
                    }

                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Theme set error:', e);
                }
            },

            toggle: function() {
                const current = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme');
                const next = current === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
                this.setTheme(next);
                return next;
            }
        };

        // Initialize immediately to prevent flash
        window.ThemeManager.init();
        
        // Sticky header - add shadow on scroll
        window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
            var header = document.querySelector('header.header');
            if (header) {
                if (window.scrollY > 10) {
                    header.classList.add('is-scrolled');
                } else {
                    header.classList.remove('is-scrolled');
                }
            }
            var lyNav = document.querySelector('.ly-nav');
            if (lyNav) {
                lyNav.classList.toggle('ly-nav--scrolled', window.scrollY > 10);
            }
        }, { passive: true });

        // Cookie Helper for Blazor
        window.blazorCookie = {
            set: function(name, value, days) {
                var expires = "";
                if (days) {
                    var date = new Date();
                    date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
                    expires = "; expires=" + date.toUTCString();
                }
                document.cookie = name + "=" + (value || "") + expires + "; path=/; SameSite=Lax; Secure";
            },
            get: function(name) {
                var nameEQ = name + "=";
                var ca = document.cookie.split(';');
                for(var i=0;i < ca.length;i++) {
                    var c = ca[i];
                    while (c.charAt(0)==' ') c = c.substring(1,c.length);
                    if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) == 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length,c.length);
                }
                return null;
            }
        };
    </script>

        
    <!-- Smooth scroll to heading for table of contents -->
    <script>
        window.scrollToHeading = function(id) {
            var element = document.getElementById(id);
            if (element) {
                var headerOffset = 80;
                var elementPosition = element.getBoundingClientRect().top;
                var offsetPosition = elementPosition + window.pageYOffset - headerOffset;
                
                window.scrollTo({
                    top: offsetPosition,
                    behavior: 'smooth'
                });
            }
        };

        // Sidebar TOC scroll spy (blog articles)
        (function() {
            var observer = null;
            function initTocSpy() {
                if (observer) observer.disconnect();
                var headings = document.querySelectorAll('.art-v2__prose h2[id]');
                if (!headings.length) return;
                observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                    entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                            var id = entry.target.id;
                            document.querySelectorAll('.art-v2__toc-link').forEach(function(link) {
                                link.classList.remove('art-v2__toc-link--active');
                            });
                            var active = document.querySelector('.art-v2__toc-link[href="#' + id + '"]');
                            if (active) active.classList.add('art-v2__toc-link--active');
                        }
                    });
                }, { rootMargin: '-80px 0px -70% 0px', threshold: 0 });
                headings.forEach(function(h) { observer.observe(h); });
            }
            var mo = new MutationObserver(function() {
                if (document.querySelector('.art-v2__prose h2[id]')) initTocSpy();
            });
            mo.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initTocSpy);
        })();

        // Sidebar TOC scroll spy (champion guides)
        (function() {
            var obs = null;
            function initGuideSpy() {
                if (obs) obs.disconnect();
                var headings = document.querySelectorAll('.cg-prose h2[id]');
                if (!headings.length) return;
                obs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                    entries.forEach(function(entry) {
                        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                            var id = entry.target.id;
                            document.querySelectorAll('.cg-toc__link').forEach(function(link) {
                                link.classList.remove('cg-toc__link--active');
                            });
                            var active = document.querySelector('.cg-toc__link[href="#' + id + '"]');
                            if (active) active.classList.add('cg-toc__link--active');
                        }
                    });
                }, { rootMargin: '-80px 0px -70% 0px', threshold: 0 });
                headings.forEach(function(h) { obs.observe(h); });
            }
            var mo2 = new MutationObserver(function() {
                if (document.querySelector('.cg-prose h2[id]')) initGuideSpy();
            });
            mo2.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initGuideSpy);
        })();
    </script>
    
    <!-- Coupon code copy functionality - Non-blocking inline script -->
    <script>
        // Analytics event tracking helper
        window.trackAnalyticsEvent = function(eventType, metadata) {
            try {
                fetch('/api/analytics/event', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ 
                        eventType: eventType, 
                        metadata: typeof metadata === 'string' ? metadata : JSON.stringify(metadata),
                        pageUrl: window.location.href
                    })
                }).catch(function() { /* silent fail */ });
            } catch(e) { /* silent fail */ }
        };
        
        // Event delegation for coupon code copying - works even if bundle.js loads later
        // Uses event delegation so it works even if elements are added dynamically
        (function() {
            'use strict';
            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (e.target && e.target.classList && e.target.classList.contains('coupon-code-clickable')) {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                var couponCode = e.target.getAttribute('data-coupon') || e.target.textContent.trim();
                
                // Track the coupon copy event
                window.trackAnalyticsEvent && window.trackAnalyticsEvent('header_coupon_copy', couponCode);
                
                if (window.copyCouponCode) {
                    window.copyCouponCode(couponCode);
                } else if (typeof copyCouponCode === 'function') {
                    copyCouponCode(couponCode);
                } else {
                    // Fallback using new toast system
                    copyToClipboard(couponCode).then(function(success) {
                       if(success) {
                           showCopyFeedback(e.target, couponCode);
                       }
                    });
                }
            }
        });
        
        function copyToClipboardFallback(text, element) {
            if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
                navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function() {
                    showCopyFeedback(element, text);
                }).catch(function() {
                    useFallbackMethod(text, element);
                });
            } else {
                useFallbackMethod(text, element);
            }
        }
        
        function useFallbackMethod(text, element) {
            var textArea = document.createElement('textarea');
            textArea.value = text;
            textArea.style.position = 'fixed';
            textArea.style.left = '-999999px';
            document.body.appendChild(textArea);
            textArea.select();
            try {
                // execCommand is deprecated but needed as fallback for older browsers
                document.execCommand('copy');
                showCopyFeedback(element, text);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Copy failed:', err);
            }
            document.body.removeChild(textArea);
        }
        
        function showCopyFeedback(element, originalText) {
            // New Toast Notification
            if (window.showToast) {
                window.showToast("Coupon copied! Use code: " + originalText, "coupon", 3000);
            }

            // Visual feedback on element (legacy but nice)
            var originalBg = element.style.backgroundColor;
            element.textContent = 'Copied!';
            element.style.backgroundColor = '#f47e27'; 
            setTimeout(function() {
                element.textContent = originalText;
                element.style.backgroundColor = originalBg;
            }, 2000);
            
            // Auto-fill checkout coupon input if on checkout page
            var couponCode = element.getAttribute('data-coupon') || originalText;
            if (window.autoFillCheckoutCoupon) {
                window.autoFillCheckoutCoupon(couponCode);
            }
        }
        
        // Copy to clipboard function for thank-you page
        window.copyToClipboard = function(text, silent) {
            if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
                return navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function() {
                    // Show toast if available and not silent
                    if (window.showToast && !silent) {
                        window.showToast('Copied to clipboard!', 'success', 2000);
                    }
                    return true;
                }).catch(function(err) {
                    console.error('Clipboard copy failed:', err);
                    // Fallback method
                    var textArea = document.createElement('textarea');
                    textArea.value = text;
                    textArea.style.position = 'fixed';
                    textArea.style.left = '-999999px';
                    document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                    textArea.select();
                    try {
                        document.execCommand('copy');
                        document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                        if (window.showToast && !silent) {
                            window.showToast('Copied to clipboard!', 'success', 2000);
                        }
                        return true;
                    } catch (err) {
                        document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                        if (window.showToast) {
                            window.showToast('Failed to copy', 'error', 3000);
                        }
                        return false;
                    }
                });
            } else {
                // Fallback for older browsers
                var textArea = document.createElement('textarea');
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.position = 'fixed';
                textArea.style.left = '-999999px';
                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.select();
                try {
                    document.execCommand('copy');
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                    if (window.showToast) {
                        window.showToast('Copied to clipboard!', 'success', 2000);
                    }
                    return Promise.resolve(true);
                } catch (err) {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                    if (window.showToast) {
                        window.showToast('Failed to copy', 'error', 3000);
                    }
                    return Promise.resolve(false);
                }
            }
        };
        
        // Make showToast available globally for JavaScript calls
        window.showToast = function(message, type, duration) {
            // Create toast element manually to match Blazor structure
            var container = document.querySelector('.toast-container');
            if (!container) {
                container = document.createElement('div');
                container.className = 'toast-container';
                document.body.appendChild(container);
            }

            var toast = document.createElement('div');
            toast.className = 'toast toast--' + type;
            
            // Icon SVG based on type
            var iconSvg = '';
            if (type === 'coupon') {
                iconSvg = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M15 5v14l-8-7 8-7z"></path><rect x="4" y="5" width="16" height="14" rx="2" ry="2"></rect><line x1="8" y1="2" x2="8" y2="5"></line><line x1="16" y1="2" x2="16" y2="5"></line><line x1="8" y1="19" x2="8" y2="22"></line><line x1="16" y1="19" x2="16" y2="22"></line></svg>'; // Ticket stub icon approximation
                // Better simple ticket:
                iconSvg = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 11.5a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9 3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1-7.6 4.7 8.38 8.38 0 0 1-3.8-.9L3 21l1.9-5.7a8.38 8.38 0 0 1-.9-3.8 8.5 8.5 0 0 1 4.7-7.6 8.38 8.38 0 0 1 3.8-.9h.5a8.48 8.48 0 0 1 8 8v.5z"></path></svg>'; // Actually let's use a promo tag icon
                iconSvg = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M20.59 13.41l-7.17 7.17a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 0L2 12V2h10l8.59 8.59a2 2 0 0 1 0 2.82z"></path><line x1="7" y1="7.01" x2="7" y2="7.01"></line></svg>';
            } else if (type === 'success') {
                iconSvg = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline></svg>';
            } else if (type === 'error') {
                iconSvg = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>';
            } else {
                iconSvg = '<svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12.01" y2="8"></line></svg>';
            }

            toast.innerHTML = `
                <div class="toast__icon">${iconSvg}</div>
                <div class="toast__content"><div class="toast__message">${message}</div></div>
                <button class="toast__close" aria-label="Close">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"></line><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"></line></svg>
                </button>
            `;

            container.appendChild(toast);

            // Animate in
            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                toast.classList.add('toast--visible');
            });

            // Close handler
            toast.querySelector('.toast__close').addEventListener('click', function() {
                toast.classList.remove('toast--visible');
                setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 300);
            });

            // Auto remove
            if (duration > 0) {
                setTimeout(function() {
                    if (document.body.contains(toast)) {
                        toast.classList.remove('toast--visible');
                        setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 300);
                    }
                }, duration);
            }
        };
        
        // Keyboard shortcuts - Escape key to close modals and sidenav
        document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Escape' || e.keyCode === 27) {
                // Close sidenav
                var backdrop = document.querySelector('.backdrop');
                if (backdrop) {
                    backdrop.click();
                }
                
                // Close any open modals/popups
                var closeButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.modal-close, .popup-close, .sidenav__close');
                closeButtons.forEach(function(btn) {
                    if (btn && btn.offsetParent !== null) { // Check if visible
                        btn.click();
                    }
                });
                
                // Close currency dropdown
                if (window.closeCurrencyDropdown) {
                    window.closeCurrencyDropdown();
                }
            }
        });
        
        // Make autoFillCheckoutCoupon available globally
        window.autoFillCheckoutCoupon = function(couponCode) {
            try {
                var couponInput = document.querySelector('.checkout-form__input[placeholder="Enter coupon code"]') || 
                                  document.querySelector('.order-form__input[placeholder="Enter coupon code"]') ||
                                  document.querySelector('input[placeholder*="coupon" i]');
                
                if (couponInput && !couponInput.disabled) {
                    couponInput.value = couponCode;
                    var inputEvent = new Event('input', { bubbles: true });
                    couponInput.dispatchEvent(inputEvent);
                    var changeEvent = new Event('change', { bubbles: true });
                    couponInput.dispatchEvent(changeEvent);
                    couponInput.focus();
                    
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        var applyButton = couponInput.nextElementSibling || 
                                         couponInput.parentElement.querySelector('.btn-form') ||
                                         couponInput.closest('.checkout-form__rowbox')?.querySelector('.btn-form') ||
                                         couponInput.closest('.order-form__rowbox')?.querySelector('.btn-form');
                        
                        if (applyButton && applyButton.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'apply' && !applyButton.disabled) {
                            applyButton.click();
                            
                            var originalBoxShadow = applyButton.style.boxShadow;
                            applyButton.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 3px rgba(79, 203, 205, 0.5)';
                            applyButton.style.transform = 'scale(0.98)';
                            setTimeout(function() {
                                applyButton.style.boxShadow = originalBoxShadow;
                                applyButton.style.transform = '';
                            }, 500);
                        }
                    }, 400);
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.log('Auto-fill coupon failed:', err);
            }
        };
        
        // Reading progress tracking for blog articles
        window.setupReadingProgress = function() {
            var progressBar = document.querySelector('.blog-reading-progress-bar');
            if (!progressBar) return;

            function updateProgress() {
                var windowHeight = window.innerHeight;
                var documentHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight;
                var scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
                var scrollableHeight = documentHeight - windowHeight;
                var progress = scrollableHeight > 0 ? (scrollTop / scrollableHeight) * 100 : 0;
                
                if (progressBar) {
                    progressBar.style.width = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, progress)) + '%';
                }
            }

            window.addEventListener('scroll', updateProgress, { passive: true });
            window.addEventListener('resize', updateProgress, { passive: true });
            updateProgress(); // Initial call
        };
        
        window.setupReadingProgressListener = function(dotNetRef) {
            window.blazorReadingProgress = dotNetRef;
            
            function updateProgress() {
                var windowHeight = window.innerHeight;
                var documentHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight;
                var scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
                var scrollableHeight = documentHeight - windowHeight;
                var progress = scrollableHeight > 0 ? (scrollTop / scrollableHeight) * 100 : 0;
                
                if (dotNetRef) {
                    dotNetRef.invokeMethodAsync('UpdateProgress', Math.min(100, Math.max(0, progress)));
                }
            }

            window.addEventListener('scroll', updateProgress, { passive: true });
            window.addEventListener('resize', updateProgress, { passive: true });
            updateProgress(); // Initial call
        };
        
        // Auto-resize textarea function for contact form
        window.autoResizeTextarea = function(textareaElement) {
            try {
                if (textareaElement && textareaElement.style) {
                    textareaElement.style.height = 'auto';
                    textareaElement.style.height = textareaElement.scrollHeight + 'px';
                }
            } catch (err) {
                console.log('Auto-resize textarea failed:', err);
            }
        };
        
        // Back to top functionality
        window.initializeBackToTop = function(dotNetRef) {
            window.backToTopDotNetRef = dotNetRef;
            window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
                if (window.backToTopDotNetRef) {
                    window.backToTopDotNetRef.invokeMethodAsync('OnScroll', window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset);
                }
            });
        };

        window.scrollToTop = function() {
            window.scrollTo({
                top: 0,
                behavior: 'smooth'
            });
        };

        // Show currency change feedback (now uses toast system)
        // Close currency dropdown after selection
        // Show currency change feedback (now uses toast system)
        window.showCurrencyChangeFeedback = function(currency) {
            if (window.showToast) {
                window.showToast("Currency changed to " + currency, "success", 2000);
            }
        };

        // Close currency dropdown after selection
        window.closeCurrencyDropdown = function() {
            try {
                var currencyPicker = document.querySelector('.header-currency-picker .header__dropdown');
                if (currencyPicker) {
                    // Add a class to prevent hover from showing dropdown
                    currencyPicker.classList.add('dropdown-closing');
                    // Hide the dropdown list directly
                    var dropdownList = currencyPicker.querySelector('.currency-picker__list');
                    if (dropdownList) {
                        dropdownList.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    // Remove the closing class after a delay (increased to 300ms)
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        currencyPicker.classList.remove('dropdown-closing');
                        if (dropdownList) {
                            dropdownList.style.display = '';
                        }
                    }, 300);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                // Silently fail
            }
        };
        })();
    </script>
